headline: Mosaic Announces Idling Of Araxá And Patrocínio Facilities And Pursuit Of Sale Of Araxá Assets
summary: TAMPA, FL / ACCESS Newswire / April 8, 2026 / As part of its efforts to reduce costs and redeploy capital, the Mosaic company today announced it will begin the process of idling and demobilizing its Araxá Mining and Chemical Complex and idling related ...
